# Geeth Me

> Sri Lankan seafood restaurant on the Trincomalee coast since 2004 — crab curry, kottu roti, devilled prawns and 113 dishes on one menu.

Geeth Me is a family-run seafood restaurant on Dockyard Road, Trincomalee, Sri Lanka. Open daily 11:00–23:00. Phone: +94 77 150 57 71. Founded 2004.

## Signature dishes

- Sri Lankan lagoon crab curry — slow-cooked in roasted coconut and Jaffna-style spice
- Cheese kottu roti — chopped godhamba roti tossed with egg, chicken or seafood and melted cheese
- Devilled prawns — wok-fired prawns with onion, capsicum and chilli paste
- Rice and curry — daily-changing fish, prawn and vegetable curries
- Seafood platter — grilled fish, prawn, calamari and crab claws

## Pages

- [Home](/): Story, gallery, signature dishes and reservations for Geeth Me Trincomalee.
- [Menu](/menu): Full 113-dish menu — rice & curry, kottu, devilled seafood, prawns, crab, chicken, beef, drinks and desserts with LKR pricing.

## Keywords

seafood restaurant Trincomalee, Sri Lankan crab curry, kottu roti, cheese kottu, devilled prawns, best restaurants Trincomalee, Dockyard Road Trincomalee, Sri Lankan seafood, Trincomalee dining, things to do Trincomalee.
